title: Pungent French Fromage Frais Polish Delight
description: A date-night Polish dish featuring creamy fromage frais, fluffy texture, and a pungent flavor profile. This paleo-friendly dish is perfect for a romantic evening in.
instructions: In a large saucepan, combine the chopped leek and minced garlic and saut57 over medium heat until softened.
Add the chicken thighs to the saucepan and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the salt and black pepper to the saucepan and continue cooking for an additional 5 minutes.
Add the fromage frais to the saucepan and stir to combine with the chicken and leek mixture.
Transfer the saucepan to the preheated oven and bake at 375�42F for 15-20 minutes, or until the chicken is cooked through and the fromage frais is heated through.
Meanwhile, heat the olive oil in a small skillet over medium heat.
Add the chopped fresh dill to the skillet and cook, stirring constantly, until fragrant, about 1 minute.
To serve, place the cooked chicken and leek mixture on a plate and top with a spoonful of the dill-infused oil.
Garnish with additional fresh dill, if desired.
